title: Rainbow Enchant Glint (Universal)
description: All enchanted items are Rainbow color! Supports 1.15+ all the way to the latest Minecraft version
body:
# Welcome to Rainbow Enchant Glint!

This resource pack changes the enchantment glint to rainbow colors! 

While other rainbow glint resource packs only add this feature for certain versions of Minecraft, this resource pack gives you a universal version which adds the rainbow enchanting glint from the first version where this was possible (1.15) all the way to the latest Minecraft release!

## Issues & Bugs
If you experience any issues or bugs related to this resource pack, feel free to let me know in my [Discord server](https://discord.gg/YPgxKKb2Mr)!

## Demonstration
